brief: Global stocks fall on tech spending fears as Andy Burnham becomes UK Labour leader; Canadian wildfire smoke blankets US; research delves into AI writing tools and human-robot interaction.
news_summary: Stock markets sink over AI investment concerns, Burnham urges party unity and 'new politics', US strikes Iranian infrastructure, and wildfire smoke spreads across the Midwest and Northeast.
papers_summary: Papers explore professional identities of writing instructors, ChatGPT revision effects on personal statements, and multimodal LLM evaluation; also human-robot juggling and narrative visualization in sports.

en.brief: Global stocks fall on tech spending fears as Andy Burnham becomes UK Labour leader; Canadian wildfire smoke blankets US; research delves into AI writing tools and human-robot interaction.
en.news_summary: Stock markets sink over AI investment concerns, Burnham urges party unity and 'new politics', US strikes Iranian infrastructure, and wildfire smoke spreads across the Midwest and Northeast.
en.papers_summary: Papers explore professional identities of writing instructors, ChatGPT revision effects on personal statements, and multimodal LLM evaluation; also human-robot juggling and narrative visualization in sports.

zh.brief: 英国工党新领袖贝安德即将出任首相，其神秘背景和务实对华政策引发关注；中国国家主席习近平首次出席世界AI大会，强调开源战略；香港国安法下书籍被大量下架，形成禁书清单。
zh.news_summary: 贝安德在无人挑战下就任工党党魁并有望成为首相，其中国政策走向受关注；习近平现身世界AI大会，将开源作为AI战略核心；香港国安法生效后，大量书籍被下架或检走，BBC中文梳理出禁书清单。
zh.papers_summary: 今日论文涉及二语写作教学中的身份构建、儿童写作中的多模态意义表达，以及AI工具如ChatGPT对写作修订的影响。
